hero.description: ZexAI unifies multi-model AI, creator economy, and robotic intelligence in a single ecosystem. Push beyond software boundaries and build a force spanning from digital to physical worlds.

story.title: Why ZexAI?
story.p1: Our global technology vision is based on the principle that artificial intelligence should not just be a digital tool, but a 'mind' that manages the physical world. Today, AI production and robotic control systems are progressing separately.
story.p2: ZexAI bridges these two worlds by transferring the power of software to robotic hardware. Our goal is to provide developers and creators with an end-to-end production and management platform, eliminating technological barriers.
story.p3: Our platform serves as a bridge connecting multi-model AI architecture with physical world robots. <1>ZexAI is not just a tool, but the backbone of the next generation digital and robotic economy.</1>
story.p4: With ZexAI, transform your ideas into digital assets and your software into robotic skills. You set the vision, ZexAI delivers to the world.

vision.whyWin2: Direct OpenSea and Zora integration for NFT minting
vision.whyWin3: Referral system: Earn 5% from credit purchases of invited users

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the ZexAI ecosystem.
faq.q1: What is ZexAI and what does it do?
faq.a1: ZexAI is a production platform powered by multi-model AI architecture. It provides access to 40+ AI models, image/video/audio generation, model comparison, digital asset creation, and a token-based creator economy. The platform unifies AI production tools, creator economy, and Web3 infrastructure in one ecosystem.
faq.a2: $ZEX token is used for AI production discounts, NFT mint fees, platform rewards, and staking. It is backed by deflationary mechanisms: 0.5% burn on transactions, 10% early unstake penalty burn, and 20% of platform revenue used for buyback & burn.
faq.q3: How does the credit system work?
faq.a3: AI production runs on a credit system. Ways to earn credits: subscription plans, credit purchases, referral system (earn 5% from invited users' credit purchases), social sharing rewards, and daily quests (login, generation, sharing). Subscription credits do not expire at month end.
faq.q4: What is the token distribution and lock schedule?
faq.a4: Total supply is 1 billion ZEX. Presale 35% (50% unlocked at listing, 50% 6-month vesting), Ecosystem 25% (gradual), Liquidity 15% (locked), Marketing 10% (gradual), Team 10% (1-year full lock + 24-month linear), Advisors 5% (6-month lock + 6-month linear). Team tokens are fully locked for 1 year — we are here to stay.
faq.q5: Which blockchain network does ZexAI use?
faq.a5: ZexAI operates on the Polygon (POL) network for low fees and high speed. You can buy $ZEX directly through our presale portal by connecting your Web3 wallet and swapping POL for $ZEX.
faq.q6: Does ZexAI provide revenue sharing (Real Yield)?
faq.a6: Yes! A portion of ZexAI's real-world revenues (subscriptions, NFT sales, etc.) is distributed to loyal $ZEX investors and stakers. By staking $ZEX, you become a direct partner in the ecosystem's success.
faq.q7: How does the NFT minting feature work?
faq.a7: ZexAI allows you to instantly mint your AI-generated images, videos, and audio as NFTs. With our seamless Web3 integration, you can directly list your creations on major marketplaces like OpenSea and Zora with just one click.
faq.q8: Can I get a refund if I change my mind during the Presale?
faq.a8: Yes, ZexAI offers a secure Refund (Buyback) mechanism. If you choose to refund your purchased $ZEX, a 15% network penalty is incurred (which is permanently burned to protect the ecosystem), and the remaining value in POL is instantly returned to your wallet.
faq.q9: Can I actually purchase a physical humanoid robot with $ZEX?
faq.a9: Yes! The ZexAI ecosystem seamlessly bridges software and hardware. During our initial release, a strictly limited batch of 80 humanoid robots is available for direct purchase using $ZEX tokens through our Web3 portal.
faq.q10: What is the long-term vision for the Robot Marketplace?
faq.a10: Our vision extends beyond simply selling hardware. The ZexAI Marketplace will become an ecosystem where developers can sell custom AI behavior modules (e.g., Security, Assistant, Entertainment). You can purchase these 'digital brains' with $ZEX and instantly deploy them to your physical robot via our secure cloud SDK.

sdk.marketDesc: Don't just buy hardware; buy brains. In the ZexAI Robot Marketplace, you can purchase humanoid robots, drones, and specialized AI behavior modules directly using $ZEX.
